execution_brief.action: Rewrite SEO title and meta description for /products/portable-litterbox
execution_brief.summary: Page at /products/portable-litterbox is ranking but underperforming on CTR. The current title and meta description don't lead with the primary keyword or communicate a clear benefit. A rewrite should lift CTR meaningfully.

steps.title: Update SEO title and meta description
steps.location: Shopify → Products → portable-litterbox → Edit SEO (bottom of page)
steps.before:
Title: Portable Litterbox & Litter Bag Kit for Travel | Go Litter™
Description: (meta description not set)
steps.after:
Title: Portable Litter Box for Air Travel: Go Litter Kit Reviewed
Description: A portable litter box built for air travel — collapsible, leak-proof, and includes a litter bag kit. See why cat owners choose Go Litter for flights and road tr
steps.note: Max 60 chars for title, max 155 for description. Lead with primary keyword.

out_of_scope: Do not change the page body copy in this sprint.
Reply DONE - #006 in the dashboard when both fields are saved.
execution_brief.definition_of_done: The updated title and description are live at https://www.outdoorbengal.com/products/portable-litterbox and visible in Google Search Console URL Inspection. Reply DONE - #006.

execution_brief.summary: Product page at /products/clicker-training-starter-kit is receiving organic traffic but converting below category median. The intro copy likely buries the primary benefit. One focused rewrite of the first paragraph plus above-the-fold positioning should move CR.

steps.title: Rewrite first paragraph of product description
steps.after:
Here's the rewrite, leading with the #1 benefit — the bond:

---

**Training your cat is one of the fastest ways to build a real relationship with them.** This starter kit gives you everything you need to get going: a quiet clicker, target stick, treats pouch, and a step-by-step guide designed for any skill level. Teach tricks, shape better behavior, and actually enjoy the process — together.

---

*(68 words. Leads with the emotional payoff, not the product features.)*
steps.note: Lead with the #1 benefit, not brand name. Make the first sentence scannable.

out_of_scope: Do not touch the SEO title or meta description (separate test).
Do not add more than one structural change in this sprint.
execution_brief.definition_of_done: Updated copy is live at https://www.outdoorbengal.com/products/clicker-training-starter-kit. First paragraph leads with the primary benefit. Reply DONE - #012.

steps.title: Update SEO title and meta description
steps.location: Shopify → Blog posts → what-tricks-can-a-cat-learn-list-of-cat-tricks-how-to-teach → Edit SEO (bottom of page)
steps.before:
Title: What Tricks Can a Cat Learn (12 Cat Tricks + How to Teach)
Description: (meta description not set)
steps.after:
Title: How to Teach a Cat Tricks: 12 Tricks Step-by-Step
Description: Learn how to teach a cat tricks using positive reinforcement. 12 tricks from sit to high-five, with trainer-tested tips that work even on stubborn cats.
steps.note: Max 60 chars for title, max 155 for description. Lead with primary keyword.

out_of_scope: Do not change the page body copy in this sprint.

queue.title: Consolidate cannibalized pages — cluster

kpi.display_label: Clicks on consolidated page · 14258 total impressions

queue.rationale:
Keyword cannibalization: 'outdoor bengal' split across 18 pages — consolidate

Evidence: pages=18 | total_impressions=14258
Engine priority: 3.0  •  Dashboard impact: 3.9

queue.title: Add Zeppelin link to cat training guide
queue.rationale:
Cat training guide currently ranks position 4 for "clicker training cats"
with ~1.2k monthly impressions. Zero internal links point to the Zeppelin
product page. Adding a contextual link in the "tools you'll need" section
should drive meaningful referral traffic.

execution_brief.action: Add one internal link from /blogs/clicker-training-cats/cat-training-guide to target product
execution_brief.summary: This page has traffic but lacks links to key product pages. Adding one contextual internal link will improve ATC rate and pass link equity.

steps.title: Add internal link in body copy
steps.before: Find the paragraph that mentions the target product.
steps.after: Wrap the product name with a link to the product page. Use exact-match anchor text.
steps.note: One link only. Do not add more than one internal link per sprint.

out_of_scope: Do not edit the SEO title or meta description.
Do not add more than one internal link.
execution_brief.definition_of_done: Link is live and clickable at https://www.outdoorbengal.com/blogs/clicker-training-cats/cat-training-guide. Reply DONE - #002.

queue.title: Fix title tag — best cat names article
queue.rationale:
Article has 114K impressions at average position 12.6 but CTR of 0.27%
is well below the positional benchmark of ~2%. Current title is
generic. Testing a more specific, benefit-driven title.

active.name: Cannibalization fix — Zeppelin redirect
active.rationale:
Two pages were competing for the same query cluster. Implemented 301
redirect from the older generic page to the Zeppelin product page.
Expecting CTR lift as Google consolidates rankings.

active.name: Conversion fix — zeppelin-cat-carrier
active.rationale:
4772 organic sessions but only 0.86% conversion — revenue leak

Engine priority: 5.5  •  Dashboard impact: 39.43

archive.name: Copy rewrite — Extra Safe Harness

Baseline measured over 14 days pre-change. Post-change measured over
14 days following a 7-day stabilization window. Statistical significance
confirmed via 2-proportion z-test (p < 0.05).
